_source: Real GitHub Copilot review-thread shape captured from Quantum-L9/PR_Repair PR #7 (get_review_comments). Bodies are real Copilot comments (no secrets); isResolved reflects the actionable state at review time. This is the connector.get_review_threads() shape the CopilotAdapter consumes.

nodes.body: The workflow-level `permissions` is set to only `contents: read`, which can prevent `actions/upload-artifact` and `actions/download-artifact` from working (artifact APIs require `actions` scope). This will break coverage upload/download and, in turn, Sonar coverage ingestion.

`actions/download-artifact` extracts into a subdirectory named after the artifact by default (here: `coverage/`). With `sonar.python.coverage.reportPaths=coverage.xml`, Sonar is likely to miss coverage unless the artifact is downloaded into the repo root.
